name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: Northwood, IA's Farmers State Bank location serves the community from 99 7Th St N with banking services.
description_long:
Farmers State Bank operates a branch at 99 7Th St N in Northwood, IA. This standalone location provides convenient banking access for the Northwood community. While hours are not published, the branch handles routine banking services.

The Northwood branch provides standard banking services including deposits, withdrawals, and account management. For specific details about services at this Northwood location, contact the branch directly.

Northwood residents and business owners should bring their ID and any necessary documentation for transactions. The branch supports the community's local banking needs.
services: Mobile banking app with balance checks and transfers
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Over 100 years of established history serving North Iowa communities
Seven physical branch locations providing in-person banking access
Mobile banking app available for iOS and Android with balance checks, transfers, and payment setup
Comprehensive product range including savings, CDs, IRAs, mortgages, personal loans, and credit cards
Digital wallet service for contactless and convenient payments
Life-stage financial planning approach with personalized product recommendations
cons: Limited geographic footprint with only seven locations in North Iowa, restricting accessibility for non-regional customers
Website lacks specific information about interest rates, APY, fees, or loan terms needed for rate comparison
No details provided about credit card rewards programs, APR ranges, or cash back benefits
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or business banking products despite serving businesses
Minimal information about customer support hours, response times, or service level commitments
best_for: North Iowa residents seeking traditional community banking with local branch access
Customers prioritizing personal relationships and face-to-face service alongside digital banking
Individuals at various life stages (families, students, retirees) seeking tailored financial guidance
People who value established, stable financial institutions with century-plus histories
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank is ideal for North Iowa residents who value community banking, local branch relationships, and personal service from an established institution. The primary caveat is the lack of specific rate and fee information on their website, requiring direct contact with the bank to evaluate competitive positioning against larger national banks or other regional lenders.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Northwood, IA banking at Farmers State Bank, 99 7Th St N. Reliable local banking branch.
